debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

proof:
by
  funext S; apply Set.ext; intro y
  constructor
  · intro h1
    match h1 with
    | ⟨x, ⟨z, hz, hfz⟩, hgy⟩ =>
      rw [←hgy, ←hfz, show g (f z) = z from congr_fun h z]
      exact hz
  · intro hy
    exact ⟨f y, ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, congr_fun h y⟩
failed_attempts:
by
  funext S; ext y
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    show (g ∘ f) x ∈ S
    rw [h]; exact hx
  · intro hy
    exact ⟨f y, ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, congr_fun h y⟩

by
  funext S; ext x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    rwa [congr_fun h z]
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩

by
  funext S
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    change (g ∘ f) z = x
    rw [h]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
    change (g ∘ f) x = x
    rw [h]; rfl

by
  funext S; apply Set.ext; intro x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    change (g ∘ f) z ∈ S
    rw [h]; exact hz
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
    change (g ∘ f) x = x; rw [h]; rfl

by
  funext S
  show image g (image f S) = S
  rw [←image_comp, h, image_id]

by
  funext S; ext x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    rwa [show g (f z) = z from congr_fun h z]
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩

by
  funext A; ext x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    change (g ∘ f) z ∈ A; rw [h]; exact hz
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩

by
  funext S
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    rwa [show g (f x) = x from congr_fun h x]
  · intro hy
    exact ⟨f y, ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩, congr_fun h y⟩

by
  funext S
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · intro h1
    cases h1 with y h2
    cases h2 with h3 h4
    cases h3 with z h5
    cases h5 with h6 h7
    rw [←h7] at h4
    change (g ∘ f) z = x at h4
    rw [h] at h4
    rw [←h4]
    exact h6
  · intro h1
    exists f x
    constructor
    · exists x
      constructor
      · exact h1
      · rfl
    · change (g ∘ f) x = x
      rw [h]
      rfl

by
  funext S; ext x
  simp [image]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    change (g ∘ f) z ∈ S
    rw [h]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    use f x
    constructor
    · use x; exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
    · change (g ∘ f) x = x; rw [h]; rfl

by
  funext S; ext x
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨_, ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    change (g ∘ f) z = x
    rw [h]; exact hz
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, by change (g ∘ f) x = x; rw [h]; rfl⟩

      rfl

  · intro hx
